# anthropic_tunnel (Data Source)

Fetches a single MCP tunnel by ID. Beta — requires OAuth Bearer auth.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_tunnel" "primary" {
  id = "tunnel_01ABC..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `workspace_id` (String)
